ruleToc.chapterList:
<js>
s=baseUrl.match(/(.*\/\d+)(.*)/)
num=result.match(/_(\d+)[^>]*>尾页</)[1]
var txt=[]
txt.push({text:"第1节",href:baseUrl})
for(var i=2;i-num<=0;i++){
	txt.push({text:"第"+i+"节",href:s[1]+"_"+i+s[2]})}
	txt
</js>

ruleBookInfo.author: //meta[@property="og:novel:author"]/@content
ruleBookInfo.lastChapter:
//meta[@property="og:novel:latest_chapter_name"]/@content##章节目录
<js>result.replace(/^(正文|VIP章节|最新章节)?(\s+|_)|[\(\{（｛【].*[求更谢乐发推票盟补加字Kk\/].*[\)\}）｝】]/g,'')</js>
<js>
result.replace(/^(\d+)、第.+章/,'第$1章')
.replace(/^(\d+)、\d+、/,'第$1章 ')
.replace(/^(\d+)、\d+/,'第$1章')
.replace(/^(第.+章)\s?\d+\s/,'$1 ')
.replace(/^(\d+)(、|. ?)/,'第$1章 ')
.replace(/^(第.+章)\s?第.+章/,'$1')
.replace(/第\s(.+)\s章/,'第$1章')
.replace(/.*(chapter|Chapter)\s?(\d+)\s?/,'$1 $2 ')
.replace(/(章)([^\s]+)(\s·)*/,'$1 $2$3')
.replace(/第([零一二三四五六七八九十百千]+)章/g,java.toNumChapter(result))
.replace(/第0+/,'第')
.replace(/(第\d+章)\s\d+(.*)/,'$1$2')
</js>

ruleToc.chapterList:
<js>
var data = JSON.parse(result).data;
var pageCount = Math.ceil(data.total/10) || 1;
var list = Array.from(Array(pageCount).keys());
for(var i = 0; i <pageCount; i++){
  var index = list[i]+1;
  list[i] = {title:'第00' + index +'页', url: baseUrl.split('&')[0] + '&type=all&page=' + index + '&pageSize=10&sort_field=create_time&sort_value=desc'};
}
list;
</js>
